final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing UI design system for a tech dashboard and mobile interface.

Style/medium: classic minimalist tech UI, clean flat vector with subtle depth, Apple Human Interface meets Swiss International style
Composition: comprehensive component sheet showing dashboard layout, mobile screen, cards, buttons, and controls in organized grid
Subject: modular UI components including navigation bar, data cards, primary/secondary buttons, toggle switches, input fields, stat widgets
Scene/backdrop: neutral light gray canvas with generous whitespace, component labels as subtle annotations
Lighting/mood: soft diffused ambient light, clean and professional atmosphere
Color palette: deep navy blue as primary, electric cyan as accent, pure white and light gray for hierarchy, subtle gradients only on interactive states
Materials/textures: smooth matte surfaces, micro-shadows for elevation, crisp 1px borders
Constraints: must maintain 8px grid system; components must be scalable from mobile to desktop; monochrome version must remain functional
Avoid: skeuomorphic textures; glassmorphism blur overload; neon glow everywhere; cluttered information density; generic startup illustration style
